content: Hi, I am able to build the haskell-template project (https://github.com/srid/haskell-template) using nix run nixpkgs#omnix ci, and I get a result symlink to a text file with some /nix/store/ paths, but how do I include the built program in my system config so I can run it like any other command without entering the devshell each time? I am on NixOS, and I have a flake-based config.
@tharnival You can just use packages.default output of the flake.
